name: encore-lite
description: The end-of-cycle surprise builder, free edition. Before your usage resets, Encore reads what you worked on all month and builds one bonus deliverable you didn't get to — or didn't think of — in time.

interface.longDescription: You paid for a full month of AI. Before your cycle ends, Encore reads what you worked on — your memory, recent chats, and connected context — and builds one bonus deliverable you didn't get to, or didn't think of, in time. Say "run encore" for an instant build, or "set up my monthly encore" to schedule it for the end of every cycle. The full Encore at encoreplugin.com adds worked playbooks, the request line, tidy mode, the unveiling delivery, and versions for Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity.
